meaning: adj.卫生的,有益的,健康的,有益健康的
examples: It showed stable, wholesome American traditions.
Peanut butter is a wholesome food, but it will put you over your daily calorie limits.
Pleasure him with sports, beguile him in wholesome ways, so that his health come again.
Hawk, a 31-year-old wholesome-looking father of two, was virtually unknown outside the skateboarding world three years ago.
Jefferson argued passionately for a national economy based on the wholesome integrity of the family farm.
